item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description:
Molva v1.1.1 — Model Selection for Built-in Groq

  • Model Selection: Choose from 5 available Groq LLM models (Llama 3.3 70B Versatile, Llama 3 70B, Mixtral 8x7B, Gemma 2 9B, Llama 3 8B)
  • Improved UI: Built-in Groq card now expandable with model picker in AI Processing settings
  • Fixed model picker and Save button alignment — matches Custom Provider layout pattern
  • Dynamic model name display in provider subtitle

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
Molva v1.1.0 — Settings Refactor & Bug Fixes

  • Cloud Models: Choose between pre-configured ElevenLabs and Groq (with hardcoded backend API keys)
  • Custom System Prompt: Toggle to override the built-in system prompt for transcription post-processing
  • Simplified AI Processing: Groq hardcoded as default LLM provider; Advanced section for custom configuration
  • Fixed critical bug: Custom system prompt toggle now actually affects AI post-processing (was silently ignored)
  • Fixed state divergence issues in Settings UI when switching cloud models or custom prompt
  • Fixed data corruption when configuring OpenAI-compatible STT endpoints
  • Removed all "unsaved changes" dialogs — Settings now use instant-save pattern
  • OpenAI-compatible provider now fully activated (no longer "Coming Soon")

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
Molva v1.0.3

  • Fixed recording intermittency when connecting/disconnecting audio devices (headphones, external mics)
  • Fixed Swift Concurrency warnings in AudioCaptureService
  • Improved audio device configuration change handling with optimized debounce and cooldown timers

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
Molva v1.0.2

  • Permissions onboarding screen on first launch
  • Launch at login setting
  • Permissions section in Settings
  • Check for Updates button now activates correctly
  • Fixed mic permission re-prompt on every recording
  • Fixed AI post-processing following instructions from transcribed speech
  • AI Processing provider section is now collapsible
  • Dictation provider cards collapsed by default; Configure button on all cards
  • Model picker loads immediately in background
  • History duration shown as 1m 30s / 2h instead of raw seconds
  • Menu bar: replaced transcript preview with Copy last transcript button

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
Molva v1.0.1

  • Fixed paste going to wrong app when Settings window was open
  • Transcript now stays in clipboard after insertion
  • More reliable clipboard sync before Cmd+V

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Molva v1.0.0

  • Renamed to Molva
  • Fixed microphone permission request on first launch
  • Dock icon toggle in General settings
  • App menu with Settings and About
  • New app icon
  • Save/Revert button in AI Processing settings
  • Dynamic model list from API (Groq, ElevenLabs, OpenAI-compatible)

item.title: Version 0.2.0
item.description:
v0.2.0

  • Groq Whisper speech-to-text provider
  • Redesigned Dictation settings with collapsible provider cards
  • Custom app icon and menu bar icon
  • Fixed microphone crash on start
  • Fixed About settings crash
  • Renamed "Proxy URL" to "Custom URL"

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
Initial Release

  • ElevenLabs speech-to-text with WebSocket and REST transport
  • Notch and floating panel display modes
  • AI post-processing with Groq and OpenAI-compatible LLMs
  • Transcription history with search and re-processing
  • Configurable hotkey and proxy support
  • Auto-updates via Sparkle
